summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DOV is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $213.08. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $231.72 and a significant trendline confluence around $226.08 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
